author: Haniewicz
description: Two-way auto/manual sync for an Obsidian vault using Google Drive. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Haniewicz
manifest.description: Two-way auto/manual vault sync using Google Drive.
manifest.name: Google Drive Vault Sync

name: Google Drive Vault Sync

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description:
Features:
- Rebuilt the sync engine safety architecture around a prepared Google Drive provider, local sync manifests, offline queue handling, safer first-sync/reset flows, and broader regression tests.
- Added a hidden Google Drive duplicate cleanup flow for remote files no longer referenced by the sync manifest.

Fixes:
- Fixed fresh Google Drive connection reset flows failing with 'Sync provider has not been prepared'.
- Improved conflict handling for concurrent edits, same-path conflicts, remote delete versus local edit conflicts, recreated files after remote deletes, and non-overlapping text auto-merges.
- Improved deletion and fast rename sync reliability, folder collision handling, and protection against sync-triggered vault event loops/startup loops.
- Improved mobile sync reentry guarding and conflict modal button wrapping.
- Avoided creating backups before conflict prompts are resolved and added local sync diagnostics logging.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Lower minAppVersion to 1.8.0 by replacing newer destructive button API with the older compatible warning button API, improving visibility for stable Obsidian clients.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Fix Obsidian review errors by raising minAppVersion for newer APIs and removing the plugin-name settings heading.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Address Obsidian review feedback: use Platform API, Setting headings, destructive buttons, FileManager trash handling, configurable vault config directory defaults, and remove builtin-modules dependency.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Remove forbidden word from plugin description for community directory validation.

releases.author: Haniewicz
releases.description: Rename plugin ID for Obsidian community directory submission.
